---
name: Feature / enhancement
about: Suggest product or workflow improvements (see ISSUE.md for full checklist)
title: "[idea] "
labels: []
---

**What workflow should improve?** (Analyze, Compare, exports, copy/share, docs, etc.)

**Problem today** — what is awkward, missing, or misleading?

**Desired outcome** — one or two sentences; optional mock / example paste.

**Constraints** — privacy, browser, self-hosted vs hosted, etc. (optional)

Tip: paste **`PQAT analysis:`** / **`PQAT compare:`** blocks from **Copy reference** or **Copy link** when your idea ties to a specific snapshot.
